stemHtml: During an approach to land an aircraft experiences a headwind at 4000 ft followed by an increasing crosswind component from the right in the friction layer. The wind shift:

options.a: Is typical in the northern hemisphere.
options.b: Results from a cold front advection in the southern hemisphere.
options.c: Results from a warm front advection in the southern hemisphere.
options.d: Is typical in the southern hemisphere.
